calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
Off Calendar Feb-19-2026 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Maureen McFadden, Esq., for Philip Whitehead, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court advises that it is satisfied with the argument that Probate Code 6124 does not apply. The court asks if there are any objections to admitting the lost will to probate. No objections are presented. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated September 11, 2015, is admitted to Probate. Philip Whitehead is appointed executor of decedent's will with full IAEA authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status of closing the estate is set for March 30, 2026. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of status report is filed two weeks prior the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Loke. Not Reported.
